use_cases: Driving user conversions on landing pages with prominent action buttons
Encouraging newsletter signups or account creation
Prompting users to start a free trial or purchase
Guiding visitors to key features or offers
Increasing engagement on marketing and product pages
ai_summary: A call-to-action component from 21st.dev featuring a conversion-focused design with shadcn/ui button variants. The component typically includes a compelling headline, supporting text, and a primary action button designed to maximize user engagement on landing pages and marketing sections. Uses standard Tailwind utility classes for styling with responsive behavior.
